prompt: surreal scene of a group of human figures standing in a dim landscape, each person connected by glowing thread-like lines forming a complex web, some individuals surrounded by dense connections while others have very few, the perspective subtly biased so that every visible person appears more connected than the viewer’s implied position, organic network resembling roots or neural pathways, soft lighting, no text, no symbols, no graphs, uncanny atmosphere, visually paradoxical composition, cinematic realism
